---
title: "About"
---


### Education

**B.S. in Statistics and Data Science**\
University of California, Santa Barbara | March 2026

**B.A. in Economics and Accounting**\    
University of California, Santa Barbara | March 2026

<br>

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/andresdan/){.btn .btn-outline-primary} 
[Resume](media/Resume_Website.docx){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Email](mailto:andresdan23@gmail.com){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
